# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"
  # Set per-environment; can be overridden at workflow dispatch or repo/environment variables
  APP_ENV: ${{ vars.APP_ENV || 'dev' }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "npm"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            package-lock.json
            **/package-lock.json

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install Python tooling
        run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip

      - name: Cache pip
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.cfg', '**/setup.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/npm-shrinkwrap.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next/cache
            .turbo
            .cache
            coverage
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

      - name: Cache configuration (includes env-specific configs)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .npmrc
            .nvmrc
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnpmfile.cjs
            pnpm-workspace.yaml
            tsconfig.json
            jsconfig.json
            babel.config.*
            .babelrc*
            webpack.config.*
            vite.config.*
            rollup.config.*
            postcss.config.*
            tailwind.config.*
            eslint.config.*
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            prettier.config.*
            .editorconfig
            .env
            .env.*
            config/**
            configs/**
            .github/config/**
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-${{ hashFiles('.npmrc', '.nvmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.pnpmfile.cjs', 'pnpm-workspace.yaml', 'tsconfig.json', 'jsconfig.json', 'babel.config.*', '.babelrc*', 'webpack.config.*', 'vite.config.*', 'rollup.config.*', 'postcss.config.*', 'tailwind.config.*', 'eslint.config.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'prettier.config.*', '.editorconfig', '.env', '.env.*', 'config/**', 'configs/**', '.github/config/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.APP_ENV }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi

      - name: Build
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build --if-present; fi

      - name: Test
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then npm test --if-present; fi
